Use truth tables to establish the following claims, where $\ph$, $\psi$, and $\chi$ are any sentences:

a. $\neg(\ph\conj\psi) \equiv \neg\ph\disj\neg\psi$

b. $(\ph\conj\neg\ph)\disj\psi\equiv \psi$

c. $\neg\neg\ph\equiv \ph$

d. $\ph\imp\psi\equiv\neg\psi\imp\neg\ph$

e. $\ph\imp(\psi\imp\chi)\equiv (\ph\conj\psi)\imp\chi$
